/** One queued track in the jukebox list */ /** Full jukebox snapshot */export class JukeboxStateParser{constructor(){this._data={roomId:0,virtualRoomId:0,isOpen:false,isPlaying:false,currentVideoId:'',currentTitle:'',requestCost:0,expediteCost:0,queue:[]};}flush(){this._data={roomId:0,virtualRoomId:0,isOpen:false,isPlaying:false,currentVideoId:'',currentTitle:'',requestCost:0,expediteCost:0,queue:[]};return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;/**
         * MUST match server JukeboxStateComposer order:
         * roomId:int
         * virtualRoomId:int 🔥 NEW
         * isOpen:bool
         * isPlaying:bool
         * currentVideoId:string
         * currentTitle:string
         * requestCost:int
         * expediteCost:int
         * queueCount:int
         * loop queueCount times:
         * id:int
         * videoId:string
         * title:string
         * requestedBy:string
         * expedited:bool
         */const roomId=wrapper.readInt();const virtualRoomId=wrapper.readInt();// 🔥 read the new field
const isOpen=wrapper.readBoolean();const isPlaying=wrapper.readBoolean();const curVid=wrapper.readString();const curTitle=wrapper.readString();const requestCost=wrapper.readInt();const expediteCost=wrapper.readInt();const count=wrapper.readInt();const queue=new Array(count);for(let i=0;i<count;i++){queue[i]={id:wrapper.readInt(),videoId:wrapper.readString(),title:wrapper.readString(),requestedBy:wrapper.readString(),expedited:wrapper.readBoolean()};}this._data={roomId,virtualRoomId,isOpen,isPlaying,currentVideoId:curVid,currentTitle:curTitle,requestCost,expediteCost,queue};return true;}get data(){return this._data;}}
